description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface. The grooves reveal a dark void beneath, suggesting the block is not solid throughout but has significant air gaps or channels. The stone surface has a marbled, speckled appearance, predominantly in shades of gray and light purple, giving it a polished yet rugged look. The sides of the block are solid and dark, contrasting with the patterned top. The grooves are deep and uniform, likely designed to serve as a drainage or ventilation feature. The overall form is robust and geometric, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments.
description: A rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on top, revealing dark voids beneath a marbled stone surface. The sides are solid and dark, emphasizing its robust, urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the marbled stone surface.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the marbled stone top and solid dark sides visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the parallel grooves and the marbled stone pattern across the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again emphasizing the deep grooves and the contrast between the patterned top and the solid sides.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or drainage cover
attribute_weathering_pattern: No significant weathering visible; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: flush with pavement or integrated into a continuous row of similar blocks
